title: Propulsion Fundamentals
shortSummary: How rocket engines generate thrust — chemical propulsion, nozzle design, combustion chambers, and the physics of exhaust velocity.
whyItMatters: The engine is the heart of the rocket. Understanding how chemical energy converts to kinetic energy through a de Laval nozzle, how combustion chamber pressure drives performance, and why propellant choice matters is essential for every aspect of launch vehicle design.
coreConcepts: Liquid vs solid vs hybrid propellants
